projects.title: Linux System Auditor
projects.description: Build a comprehensive Bash script that gathers system information, user accounts, running services, and open ports into a professional audit report.

projects.title: Automated Network Mapper & Logger
projects.description: Create a cron‑driven reconnaissance tool that periodically scans a target subnet, logs discovered hosts and open ports, and manages log rotation with stealth in mind.

projects.title: Stealth Persistence Framework
projects.description: Develop a modular Bash framework that establishes covert persistence, evades basic forensic detection, and includes self‑destruct mechanisms.
